member.name: T:ContractId
member.summary: The ID for a smart contract instance on Hedera.

member.name: M:ContractId.#ctor(System.Int64)
member.summary: Assign the num part of the contract id.
member.param:
the num part of the account id
Constructor that uses shard, realm and num should be used instead as shard and realm should not assume 0 value

member.name: M:ContractId.#ctor(System.Int64,System.Int64,System.Int64)
member.summary: Assign all parts of the contract id.
member.param: the shard part of the contract id
the realm part of the contract id
the num part of the contract id

member.name: M:ContractId.#ctor(System.Int64,System.Int64,System.Int64,System.String)
member.summary: Assign all parts of the contract id.
member.param: the shard part of the contract id
the realm part of the contract id
the num part of the contract id

member.name: M:ContractId.FromString(System.String)
member.summary: Parse contract id from a string.
member.param: the string containing a contract id

member.name: M:ContractId.FromSolidityAddress(System.String)
member.summary: Retrieve the contract id from a solidity address.
member.remarks: @deprecatedThis method is deprecated. Use {@link #fromEvmAddress(long, long, String)} instead.

member.name: M:ContractId.FromEvmAddress(System.Int64,System.Int64,System.String)
member.summary: Parse contract id from an ethereum address.

member.name: M:ContractId.FromProtobuf(Proto.ContractId)
member.summary: Extract a contract id from a protobuf.
member.param: the protobuf containing a contract id

member.name: M:ContractId.FromBytes(System.Byte[])
member.summary: Convert a byte array to an account balance object.
member.exception: when there is an issue with the protobuf

member.name: P:ContractId.Shard
member.summary: The shard number

member.name: P:ContractId.Realm
member.summary: The realm number

member.name: P:ContractId.Num
member.summary: The id number

member.name: P:ContractId.EvmAddress
member.summary: The 20-byte EVM address of the contract to call.

member.name: P:ContractId.Checksum
member.summary: The checksum.

member.name: M:ContractId.ToSolidityAddress
member.summary: Extract the solidity address.
member.returns: the solidity address as a string

member.name: M:ContractId.ToEvmAddress
member.summary: toEvmAddress returns EVM-compatible address representation of the entity

member.name: M:ContractId.ToProtobuf
member.summary: Convert contract id to protobuf.

member.name: M:ContractId.PopulateContractNum(Client)
member.summary: Gets the actual `num` field of the `ContractId` from the Mirror Node. Should be used after generating `ContractId.fromEvmAddress()` because it sets the `num` field to `0` automatically since there is no connection between the `num` and the `evmAddress` Sync version

member.name: M:ContractId.PopulateContractNumAsync(Client)
member.summary: Gets the actual `num` field of the `ContractId` from the Mirror Node. Should be used after generating `ContractId.fromEvmAddress()` because it sets the `num` field to `0` automatically since there is no connection between the `num` and the `evmAddress` Async version
member.remarks: @deprecatedUse 'populateContractNum' instead due to its nearly identical operation.

member.name: M:ContractId.Validate(Client)
member.exception: if entity ID is formatted poorly

member.name: M:ContractId.ValidateChecksum(Client)
member.summary: Verify the checksum.
member.exception: if entity ID is formatted poorly

member.name: M:ContractId.ToStringWithChecksum(Client)
member.summary: Create a string representation that includes the checksum.
member.returns: the string representation with the checksum
